tour.overviewBody: Overview is where you land. Once you go live, your revenue, bookings, occupancy and ratings show up here at a glance.
tour.bookingsBody: Every reservation lands here. Confirm or decline pending stays, see who's checking in, and open any booking for full details.
tour.inboxBody: Guest messages and enquiries live in the Inbox. Quick replies win more bookings — unread counts show right on this menu item.
tour.calendarBody: The Calendar shows every stay across your properties. Block dates, spot gaps, and keep your direct bookings in sync.
tour.listingsBody: Add and edit properties here — photos, pricing, rooms and amenities. Polished properties convert browsers into bookings.
tour.financesBody: The Finances group holds your ledger, payments, quotes, invoices, credit notes and refunds — a full picture of what you're owed and paid.
tour.settingsBody: Settings is home to your banking details, business profile and subscription plan. Get these right so payouts reach you.
tour.bookingLinkBody: This opens your direct booking page. Share it on social, WhatsApp or your website — guests book you directly, commission-free.

pitch.s1Sub: {brand} is the direct-booking platform built for South African hosts. No commission — just your guests, your money, your brand.
pitch.s2Point1Body: The big platforms take a cut off the top of every guest who finds you — forever.
pitch.s2Point2Body: Bookings in email, payments in a spreadsheet, chats on WhatsApp. Nothing joins up.
pitch.s2Point3Body: The platform owns the relationship. Stop paying and your guests vanish with it.
pitch.s3Title: One page. One dashboard. Zero commission.
pitch.s3Body: A branded booking page guests book directly, and one dashboard that runs the whole business. A flat monthly fee — never a slice of your bookings.
pitch.s4Title: The money goes straight to you.
pitch.s4Body: Guests pay into your own Paystack, PayPal or bank account. {brand} never holds, pools or touches your funds.
pitch.s5Body: Every guest who books is yours to keep — full contact details, conversation history and private notes. Reviews and reputation travel with the guest, so trust compounds.
pitch.s6Title: Every host headache — solved in one place.
pitch.featPaymentsBenefit: No commission. Guests pay by card, PayPal or EFT straight into your own account.
pitch.featInboxBenefit: Every conversation in one thread — the relationship the platforms used to take from you.
pitch.featBookingsBenefit: No more email, spreadsheets and WhatsApp. Confirm, decline and track every stay in one view.
pitch.featCalendarBenefit: Two-way iCal sync with Airbnb & Booking.com keeps every calendar in step.
pitch.featListingsBenefit: A branded booking page that's yours to share — not a listing buried in a marketplace.
pitch.featReviewsBenefit: Reviews are collected automatically and you reply in public — trust that follows you, not the platform.
pitch.featPricingBenefit: Seasonal rates and length-of-stay discounts apply themselves — no manual price changes.
pitch.featReportsBenefit: Revenue, occupancy and booking trends at a glance — decisions without the guesswork.
pitch.s8Title: Built, live, and ready for you.
pitch.s8Point1Body: Guests pay hosts directly through Paystack today.
pitch.s8Point2Body: ZAR pricing, local payment methods and local support — not a global app bolted on.
pitch.s8Point3Body: Built end-to-end and improving constantly. Your feedback shapes what's next.
pitch.s9Body: Create your free profile in minutes and get discovered today.
pitch.mAssumption: Example — a host taking {volume} a month in bookings:
pitch.mSavingsSub: That's about {yearly} a year back in your pocket.
pitch.mFootnote: Illustrative example — your saving grows with every booking.
pitch.dBody: Revenue, bookings, occupancy and ratings — your whole business at a glance, updated live.
pitch.bBody: Accept or decline in a tap, track deposits and balances, and see exactly who's arriving when.
pitch.cBody: One calendar for every channel. Two-way iCal sync keeps Airbnb and Booking.com in step automatically.
pitch.gBody: Your own branded page on the {brand} directory — share the link anywhere and take bookings direct, with no algorithm in the way.
pitch.rBody: Collected automatically after every stay and shown on your page — a reputation that follows you, not a marketplace.
pitch.hStep1Body: Claim your page and add your details in minutes.
pitch.hStep2Body: Photos, pricing, calendar and house rules — all guided.
pitch.hStep3Body: Share your link, take direct bookings, and the money lands in your account.
pitch.s7Sub: One flat fee. No commission, no per-booking cut, no surprises.
pitch.oTitle: Yes — it's safe, and it's yours.
pitch.oA1: Guests pay into your own Paystack, PayPal or bank account. {brand} never holds your funds.
pitch.oQ2: Who owns my guests and data?
pitch.oA2: You do — full contact details, history and notes, yours to keep and export.
pitch.oA3: No contracts. A flat monthly fee you can cancel anytime.
pitch.oQ4: Do I lose my existing listings?
pitch.oA4: No — sync your calendar with Airbnb and Booking.com and run them side by side.

nav.tagline: Direct bookings · zero commission to guests

footer.tagline: South Africa's direct-stay platform. Book directly with the host. Pay the price you see.

home.heroSubtitle: {count, plural, =0 {Book straight with the host — secure payment, zero booking fees, no middle-man.} =1 {Browse {formatted} verified property and book straight with the host — secure payment, zero booking fees, no middle-man.} other {Browse {formatted} verified properties and book straight with the host — secure payment, zero booking fees, no middle-man.}}
home.dealsTitle: December at the coast — save up to 25%
home.dealsBody: Selected Garden Route and Whale Coast stays, booked direct with the host. No code needed.
home.groupBody: Hand-picked stays that sleep 8+. Game lodges, beach houses, working farms — book the whole thing, no per-head haggling.
home.pillarsTitle: Direct stays, the way they should be.
home.pillarNoFeesBody: The price you see is the price you pay. No service fees, no surprise charges at checkout.
home.pillarVerifiedBody: Every host is ID-verified and payment-vetted before they can list. Look for the green tick.
home.pillarTalkBody: Message the actual host before you book. Real answers, no scripted call-centre replies.
home.pillarCancelBody: Policies shown up-front with a one-tap refund preview. No hunting through fine print.
home.hostTitle: Got a place to share? List it on {brand}.
home.hostBody: Branded booking page, calendar that syncs with Airbnb & Booking.com, unified inbox, payments via Paystack or PayPal. Flat monthly fee. Zero commissions.
home.newsTitle: New stays in your inbox every Friday.
home.newsBody: Six hand-picked stays a week. Honest reviews from real guests. Zero spam, one-click unsubscribe — and no, we won't sell your email to anyone.
home.appTitle: Book on the way to the airport.
home.appBody: Native iOS and Android apps. Save listings, message hosts, manage your bookings — all in your pocket.
home.featuredBody: The places we'd send our own friends. Real photos, fair pricing, and a host you can actually message.

listing.notChargedYet: You won't be charged yet · choose your dates & rooms next.
listing.heldSecurely: Held securely until your trip is confirmed.
listing.availabilityBody: Dates the host has blocked or that are already booked.
listing.specialsSubtitle: Pre-packaged stays from this host at a price they set — book directly.
listing.hlInstantBody: Confirm your stay immediately — no waiting on the host.
listing.hlCheckinBodyTime: Check-in from {time} — the host shares full directions ahead of arrival.
listing.hlCheckinBody: The host shares full directions ahead of arrival.
listing.hlVerifiedBody: Identity and payment details verified by {brand}.
listing.roomsSubtitle: Book one room, a few, or the whole place — you'll choose when you reserve.
listing.roomsTapReserve: Tap Reserve to pick your dates and rooms.
listing.safetyNote: For your safety, never transfer money or chat outside {brand}.
listing.ratesIntroRooms: Prices below are per room, per night, in {currency}. The host sets seasonal tiers across the year.
listing.ratesIntro: Prices below are per night, in {currency}. The host sets seasonal tiers across the year.
listing.ratesPickDates: Pick your dates in the calendar to see the exact nightly price for your stay.
listing.ratesStandardDesc: Applies on any date outside the seasons below.
listing.ratesCleaningNote: Cleaning fee (<fee></fee>) and any add-ons are separate
listing.ratesExtrasSuffix: , charged per night on top of the rate.
listing.ratesWeeklyBody: {pct}% off when you stay 7+ nights, applied automatically at checkout.
listing.trustRepliesDays: {count, plural, one {Replies in ~# day} other {Replies in ~# days}}
listing.trustYearsHosting: {count, plural, one {# yr hosting} other {# yrs hosting}}
listing.hostRatingFrom: {rating} from {count, plural, one {# verified stay} other {# verified stays}}

thingsToKnow.maxGuests: {count, plural, one {# guest maximum} other {# guests maximum}}
thingsToKnow.minNights: {count, plural, one {# night minimum} other {# nights minimum}}
thingsToKnow.nonRefundable: Non-refundable — no refund at any time.
thingsToKnow.ruleDaysBefore: {count, plural, one {#+ day before check-in} other {#+ days before check-in}}
thingsToKnow.contactHost: Contact the host for cancellation terms.
thingsToKnow.legal: By booking you agree to the <terms>booking terms</terms> and <privacy>privacy notice</privacy>.

currency.estimateNote: Prices shown in {display} are estimates — you'll be charged in {settlement}.

booking.failedBody: No worries — your card wasn't charged. You can try again with a different card, or contact the host directly.

book.step1Sub: Pick when you're coming and the rooms you'd like — book one, a few, or the whole place.
book.step2Sub: Tell your host who's coming and add anything to make the stay special.
book.step3Sub: All payments are processed securely. {brand} never charges a booking fee.

businesses.title: Businesses
businesses.subtitle: Each business has its own details, address, banking, currency and language. Properties are assigned to a business, and its details appear on that property's quotes and invoices.
businesses.currencyHint: Default for new properties assigned to this business.
businesses.languageHint: Default language for this business's guest documents.
businesses.archiveConfirmBody: It will be hidden from your list. You can't archive the default business or one that still has properties assigned.
businesses.bankingSubtitle: The default account prints on this business's invoices, quotes and EFT instructions.
businesses.personalSubtitle: For your records only — never shown to guests or printed on documents.

website.heading: Your website
website.subheading: A branded, hosted site for your business — built from your property data, funnelling bookings into your existing engine.
website.noBusinesses: Add a business first to create its website.
website.lockedTitle: The website builder isn't on your plan
website.lockedBody: Build a branded, hosted website for your business — pages, rooms, a blog and your own custom domain. Available on a paid plan.
website.createBody: Pick a web address. You can connect a custom domain later.
website.themesSub: Pick a complete design to start from — it loads the look and the pages. You then make it yours in Brand Studio.
website.themeApplyWarning: Applying {name} replaces your current design and pages with the theme's. Your customisations in Brand Studio will be reset. This can't be undone.
website.themeApplyError: Couldn't apply the theme. Please try again.
website.savedDesignsSub: Snapshots of your design + pages you can roll back to. We also auto-save before every theme switch, so switching is always safe.
website.noSavedDesigns: No saved designs yet. Switch a theme or save the current design to create a restore point.
website.saveDesignSub: Give it a name so you can find it later.
website.designSaveError: Couldn't save the design. Please try again.
website.restoreWarning: This replaces your current design and pages with the saved version. Your current state is auto-saved first, so this is reversible.
website.restoreError: Couldn't restore the design. Please try again.
website.resetDefaultWarning: This restores a clean, guaranteed-working default site — replacing your current design and pages. Your current state is auto-saved first, so you can roll back.
website.publishDisabledHint: Finish building your pages, then publish to go live.
website.ovDraftHint: Publish your site to make this address go live.
website.ovNoTraffic: No visits yet — publish and share your site to start seeing traffic here.
website.ovAttnAllGood: You're all caught up — nothing needs attention.
website.attnDomain: Your custom domain isn't verified yet
website.attnPostsNoSeo: {count} blog post(s) missing an SEO title or description
website.attnNoSeoTitle: Add an SEO title so you rank in search
website.errInvalidChars: Use only letters, numbers and hyphens.
website.errReserved: That web address is reserved — pick another.
website.errSubdomainTaken: That web address is taken — pick another.
website.errAlreadyExists: This business already has a website.
website.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
website.brandSub: Your logo, site name and tagline — shown across every page of your site.
website.logoHint: PNG, JPG, WebP or SVG, up to 4 MB. A transparent PNG looks best in the header.
website.logoTypeError: Use a PNG, JPG, WebP or SVG image.
website.logoUploadError: Couldn't upload that image. Please try again.
website.taglinePlaceholder: e.g. Boutique stays in the Winelands
website.taglineHint: A short line shown under your name. Optional.
website.brandLogoStyleHint: How your logo shows in the site header.
website.faviconHint: The little icon in browser tabs. Square PNG, at least 64×64.
website.brandContactSub: Shown in your site footer so guests can reach you.
website.brandPreviewBody: This is how your header and footer will look to guests.
website.brandPreviewHeading: A warm welcome to your stay
website.brandIdentitySub: Your site name, tagline and contact details — shown in the header and footer.
website.brandLogoSub: Shown in the header. A transparent PNG or SVG works best.
website.brandLogoLightSub: Used on dark backgrounds. Falls back to your primary logo if left empty.
website.brandLogoIconSub: A square mark used in compact spaces. Falls back to your primary logo.
website.brandAppleIconSub: Shown when a guest saves your site to their home screen (180×180px).
website.brandColoursSub: Fine-tune any colour, or leave a field blank to inherit the applied theme.
website.brandPresetSub: Start from a preset, then fine-tune the colours below.
website.brandPaletteSub: Keep your brand colours handy in every colour picker.
website.brandTypeScaleSub: Set the base text size and how quickly headings grow.
website.brandButtonsSub: Choose how buttons look and how rounded corners are across your site.
website.btnColorHint: Leave blank to inherit theme accent
website.brandCornersSub: Corner roundness for buttons, cards and inputs.
website.brandSpecimenBody: Sphinx of black quartz, judge my vow. Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs while the lazy dog sleeps and the quick brown fox jumps over.
website.brandStudioDraftHint: Draft — saved to your site on Save
website.brandSizesSub: Fine-tune each heading and text size, or leave it on Auto to follow the base size and scale.
website.brandImagesSub: Style how photos look across your site — corners, border and shadow.
website.themeSub: Pick a look, then fine-tune the accent colour, fonts and corners. Changes show in the preview below.
website.themePreviewLive: Live preview — your real home page
website.previewBody: This is how headings, text and buttons will look on your site.
website.pagesSub: Build each page from sections. Your Home and About pages are ready to edit.
website.pagesManageSub: Add pages, edit them, and set what appears in your site's navigation. Drag to reorder.
website.deletePageBody: "{page}" and its content will be permanently removed. This can't be undone.
website.cannotDeleteHome: The Home page can't be deleted.
website.addPageSub: Give it a name and pick a starting point.
website.pageTemplateDesc_blank: An empty page to build yourself.
website.pageTemplateDesc_landing: Hero, highlights, rooms, reviews & a CTA.
website.pageTemplateDesc_rooms: Rooms, amenities, rates & a booking CTA.
website.pageTemplateDesc_gallery: An intro with a photo gallery.
website.seoFocusKeywordHint: The main phrase you want this page to rank for.
website.socialNoImage: Set a share image in SEO settings for a richer preview.
website.pageSeoTitleHint: Shown in search results & the browser tab for this page. Leave blank to use your site title.
website.pageSeoDescHint: The snippet under the title in search results. Leave blank to use your site description.
website.pageSeoDescFallback: Your page description will appear here.
website.publishError: Couldn't publish your site. Please try again.
website.siteOffline: Your site has been taken offline.
website.takeOfflineBody: Visitors won't be able to see your site until you publish again. Your pages and last published version are kept.
website.statusLiveBody: Published {when}. Visitors see your latest published version.
website.statusChangesBody: Your site is live, but recent edits aren't visible yet. Publish to make them go live.
website.statusDraftBody: Build your pages, then publish to go live. Use Preview to see how it looks first.
website.sectionCount: {count, plural, =0 {No sections} one {# section} other {# sections}}
website.draftSaveError: Couldn't save your page. Please try again.
website.sectionInvalid: Check the “{section}” section — a required field is empty.
website.noSections: No sections yet. Use “Add section” to start building this page.
website.homeStaysFirst: Your home page always stays first
website.visualEditHint: Click a section in the preview to edit it.
website.visualEditLiveHint: This section pulls live data — edit its settings here.
website.librarySub: Pick a building block — it drops in with starter content you can edit.
website.saveBlockSub: Reuse this section on any page.
website.sectionDesc_hero: Big banner with a headline, image and call-to-action button.
website.sectionDesc_intro: A short welcome paragraph to set the scene.
website.sectionDesc_highlights: A grid of selling points with icons.
website.sectionDesc_stats: Eye-catching numbers — guests hosted, rating, years.
website.sectionDesc_gallery: Your property photos, pulled in automatically.
website.sectionDesc_logos: A strip of partner or 'as featured in' logos.
website.sectionDesc_rooms_preview: Live rooms & rates with a Book button.
website.sectionDesc_location: Map and nearby points of interest from your property.
website.sectionDesc_map: An embedded map of any address you choose.
website.sectionDesc_reviews: Real guest reviews, pulled in automatically.
website.sectionDesc_cta: A bold prompt with a button to drive bookings.
website.sectionDesc_host_bio: Introduce yourself with a photo and a few words.
website.sectionDesc_values: What you stand for as a host.
website.sectionDesc_rich_text: A free-form block for your own formatted text.
website.sectionDesc_contact_form: Let visitors message you — lands in your inbox.
website.sectionDesc_specials_preview: Your live specials & deals with a Book button.
website.sectionDesc_amenities: A grid of your facilities with icons.
website.sectionDesc_video: Embed a YouTube or Vimeo video.
website.fldBackgroundImageHint: A wide photo works best behind the headline. PNG, JPG or WebP, up to 6 MB.
website.fldCtaHrefHint: Use #rooms to jump to the rooms section, or a full link.
website.scheduleHint: Leave dates empty to always show. Scheduling applies on your live site only.
website.fldVideoUrlHint: Paste a YouTube or Vimeo URL
website.fldMapAddressHint: An address, place name or coordinates — shown on an embedded map.
website.contactFormNote: Submissions land in your inbox as a Website Enquiry. Turn on email alerts in the Settings tab.
website.fldHtmlHint: Basic HTML is supported (headings, bold, lists, links).
website.imageTypeError: Use a PNG, JPG or WebP image.
website.imageUploadError: Couldn't upload that image. Please try again.
website.mediaLibraryDesc: Reuse a photo you've already uploaded, or add a new one.
website.mediaEmpty: No images yet. Upload your first one.
website.mediaDeleteConfirm: Delete this image? It will be removed from anywhere it's used.
website.mediaAltPlaceholder: Describe the image (for SEO & screen readers)
website.mediaLoadError: Couldn't load your media. Please try again.
website.liveGallery: Pulls live from your property photos — no need to upload here.
website.liveRooms: Pulls live from your rooms & rates. Manage which rooms show on the Rooms tab.
website.liveLocation: Pulls live from your property's address and nearby points of interest.
website.liveReviews: Pulls live from your published guest reviews.
website.liveBlog: Pulls live from your published blog posts.
website.liveSpecials: Pulls live from your active specials. Manage them under Properties › Specials (only specials set to show on your website appear).
website.roomsSub: Choose which rooms appear on your site, set their order, and tweak how each one is shown. Booking always uses your live prices and availability.
website.roomsEmpty: No rooms found for this site's properties yet. Add rooms to a property, then sync them here.
website.roomsShownCount: {shown} of {total} rooms showing on your site
website.roomsSyncHint: Pull in any rooms added since you created this site (and remove deleted ones).
website.roomOverrideHint: Leave blank to use the room's own details.
website.roomPriceCosmetic: Shown for display only — guests are always charged your live, server-calculated price at booking.
website.groupHeroHint: A wide banner shown above this property's rooms.
website.roomsPreviewNote: Preview reflects your saved rooms. Save to see your latest changes.
website.blogSub: Write posts to share news, stories and local guides. Published posts appear on your live site and in any blog section.
website.blogPostCount: {count, plural, =0 {No posts yet} one {# post} other {# posts}}
website.blogEmpty: No posts yet. Create your first one to get started.
website.blogCategoriesSub: Optional — group your posts. Removing a category leaves its posts uncategorised.
website.blogDeleteBody: "{title}" will be removed from your site. This can't be undone.
website.blogTitleRequired: Give your post a title first.
website.blogStatusDraft: Draft — only you can see it
website.blogScheduleHint: Your post goes live automatically at this time.
website.blogCategoryCount: {count, plural, =0 {No posts} one {# post} other {# posts}}
website.blogAuthorBioHint: A short line about the author, shown on the post.
website.blogAuthorsSub: Create reusable author profiles with a photo and bio, then pick one on each post.
website.blogNoAuthorsHint: Add an author in the Blog tab to attribute this post.
website.blogSlugHint: Leave blank to use the title. Used in the post's web address.
website.blogCoverHint: Shown at the top of the post and in blog previews.
website.blogExcerptHint: A short summary shown in blog previews and search results.
website.blogSeoDescPlaceholder: Add an excerpt or meta description to control how this post looks in search results.
website.domainSub: Use your free Vilo address, or connect your own custom domain.
website.domSubdomainHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only.
website.domCanonicalSub: Which version of your domain should be the main one.
website.domCanonicalHint: Visitors on the other version are redirected to your preferred one.
website.domConnectSub: Already own a domain? Point it at your site in a few steps.
website.domNotConfigured: Custom domains aren't available just yet. Check back soon.
website.domConnected: Domain connected. Add the DNS records below.
website.domPendingHint: Add the DNS records below at your domain registrar. Verification and SSL can take a few minutes to a few hours.
website.domActiveHint: Your domain is live and secured with SSL.
website.domDnsSub: Add these records at your domain registrar (where you bought the domain).
website.domErrInvalid: That doesn't look like a valid domain.
website.domErrIsRoot: Use a domain you own — not a Vilo address.
website.domErrTaken: That domain is already connected to another site.
website.domErrNotConfigured: Custom domains aren't available just yet. Check back soon.
website.domErrVercel: Couldn't connect that domain. Please check it and try again.
website.seoSub: Control how your site appears in Google and when shared on social media.
website.navSub: Menu, top bar, header button and footer — applied across your site.
website.navMenuDesc: Your header menu. Leave empty to use your pages automatically.
website.navMenuEmpty: No custom menu yet — your pages are shown automatically. Add links or build from your pages.
website.navTopBarDesc: A thin strip above the header for contact details or an announcement.
website.navWhatsappHint: Digits only, with country code — e.g. 27821234567.
website.navHeaderDesc: The button shown in your header and how the header behaves.
website.navCtaHrefHint: Where the header button goes (defaults to your booking link).
website.navSticky: Keep the header visible on scroll
website.navTransparentHint: Best for pages that start with a full-width hero image; the header fades in on scroll.
website.navCopyrightHint: Shown at the bottom of the footer (defaults to © your site name).
website.navFooterColsDesc: Add columns of links to the footer (e.g. Explore, Policies).
website.navFooterColsEmpty: No footer columns yet. Add one to show link groups in your footer.
website.settingsEnquiriesDesc: Every contact-form submission lands in your inbox as a Website Enquiry. You can also have a copy emailed to you.
website.settingsEmailHint: We'll email this address each time someone submits a contact form. Submissions still appear in your inbox.
website.seoTitleHint: Shown as the headline in search results. Aim for under 60 characters.
website.seoDescHint: A short summary shown under the title in search results.
website.seoDescFallback: Add a meta description to control how your site looks in search results.
website.seoOgHint: Shown when your site is shared on social media. 1200×630px works best.
website.seoRobotsIndex: Allow search engines to index this site
website.seoRobotsHint: Turn off to keep your site out of Google while you build it.
website.seoGscHint: Paste the verification token from Google Search Console to verify ownership.

specials.noHostBody: Finish host onboarding before creating specials.
specials.lockedTitle: Specials aren't on your plan yet
specials.lockedBody: Upgrade your plan to create pre-packaged deals for your properties.
specials.heroSubtitle: Bundle a stay, date treatment and a price you fully control. Specials book and settle exactly like a normal booking — they just override your seasonal pricing.
specials.emptyBody: Create a pre-packaged deal — pick a property, set your dates and a fixed price, and choose where it shows.
specials.toastLinkError: Couldn't copy — copy the link manually.
specials.deleteBody: “{title}” will be removed from your specials. Existing bookings made from it are unaffected.
specials.fldRoomHint: Whole property, or limit the deal to one room type.
specials.secDatesSub: Fixed stay, or a flexible window.
specials.fldFlatTotalHint: One flat price for the whole stay.
specials.fldMaxGuestsHint: Leave blank to inherit the room / property maximum.
specials.secAvailSub: How many, and when it runs.
specials.fldQuantityHint: How many times this deal can be booked before it sells out.
specials.fldQuantityFixedHint: Fixed-date deals can only sell once — the room is booked for those exact dates.
specials.secAddonsSub: Bundle extras as compulsory (always included) or optional upsells.
specials.addonsEmpty: You have no add-ons yet. Create some under Properties → Add-ons to bundle them onto a special.
specials.inlineSaveToLibraryHint: Reuse this extra on other specials
specials.inlineNameRequired: Please enter a name for the extra.
specials.secMerchSub: How the deal is categorised and surfaced.
specials.fldCustomTagsHint: Your own free-form tags (shown on your website only).
specials.fldBadgeHint: Optional ribbon shown on the deal card.
specials.fldFeaturedHint: Pin it to the front of the directory and your website.
specials.fldDescriptionPlaceholder: What's included, why it's a deal…
specials.fldHeroHint: Shown on the deal card and detail page.
specials.heroNoWebsite: This property's business needs a website before you can add a hero image. The deal will use the property's own photos until then.
specials.secPolicySub: By default a special inherits the property / room policy.
specials.fldWebsiteHint: Show on this business's Vilo website.
specials.linkOnlyNote: With both off, the special is link-only — reachable only by sharing its direct link.
specials.noPropertyBody: A special is built on one of your properties. Create a property before building a deal.
specials.heroImgError: Use a PNG, JPG or WebP image.
specials.heroImgTooBig: Image must be 6 MB or smaller.
specials.dirMetaDesc: Pre-packaged accommodation deals from hosts across South Africa — book directly at a price the host controls.
specials.dirSubtitle: Pre-packaged stays at a price the host sets — book directly, no marketplace commission.
specials.dirSearchPlaceholder: Search by city, province or deal
specials.dirEmptyBody: Try a different city or category. New deals from {brand} hosts go live all the time.
specials.dtDirectNote: You book directly with the host.
specials.dtPartOfBody: Browse the full property, its rooms, amenities and house policies.
specials.bkErrDates: Choose your check-in and check-out dates.
specials.bkErrBeforeWindow: Check-in is before the offer window.
specials.bkErrAfterWindow: Check-out is after the offer window.
specials.bkErrMinNights: This deal needs at least {count} nights.
specials.bkErrMaxNights: This deal is for at most {count} nights.
specials.bkErrPassword: Choose a password of at least 8 characters.
specials.bkErrAck: Please accept the policies to book.
specials.bkFinalNote: Final price is confirmed at payment.
specials.bkNoPayments: This host hasn't set up payments yet.
specials.bkAck: I accept the booking terms and cancellation policy{note}.
specials.mgrIntro: Limited-time deals and curated packages that fill midweek gaps and reward direct bookings — live on your website and in the {brand} directory.
specials.ghostBody: A package deal or a per-night rate — built from scratch.
specials.emptyMatchBody: Try a different filter or clear your search.
specials.railCatCount: {count, plural, =0 {No categories} one {# category} other {# categories}}
specials.railAddonCount: {count, plural, =0 {No extras} one {# extra} other {# extras}}
specials.rpKpiRevenueSub: {count, plural, one {# confirmed booking} other {# confirmed bookings}}
specials.rpUniqueViewers: {count, plural, one {# unique viewer} other {# unique viewers}}
specials.rpRecentEmpty: No bookings from this special yet.
specials.rpFootnote: Views are cookieless visits to this special's public page. Booking, revenue and sell-through count realised bookings against your quantity cap.
specials.ddNoFeeBanner: You pay your host directly and the saving comes straight off their rate — {brand} never adds a booking fee.
specials.ddOfferPriceBodyPkg: One fixed package price for your whole stay — confirmed at checkout, with no surprises.
specials.ddOfferPriceBodyNight: A set nightly rate on every eligible night, applied automatically at checkout.
specials.ddOfferSaveBody: You save {pct}% versus the usual rate — the discount is built right into the price.
specials.ddOfferIncludedBody: These come bundled into the deal at no extra cost.
specials.ddPanelReassure: The saving comes off your host's rate — you pay them directly and {brand} adds no fee.
specials.ddRoomsIntroWhole: Booking this deal books the whole place — here are the rooms you'll have.
specials.ddRoomsIntroRoom: This deal is for the room below.
